command:
cd ~/Documents/Projects/Hyo && git add -A && git diff --cached --stat && git commit -m "fix: add commit-must-push rule (SE-010-015)

8 commits sat local for 18h because Kai moved on without pushing.
Added mandatory push-after-commit to VERIFICATION_PROTOCOL,
CLAUDE.md, and error recall table. Never again.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>" && git push origin main 2>&1
